title: Best PVP.
body:
---

![Best PVP Description Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86f133f6b42208202efe559fbd2dfd2273799d02_0.webp)

---

## Overview

Best PVP is a performance-focused PVP modpack that aims not only to look good, but to perform well on all hardware.
Built for PVP-ers, it focuses on:

* Performance
* Aesthetics
* Utility

![FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a25d653da8455b49b716b09b2734170891544339_0.webp)

---

## Mods/Recourse Packs

1. Lunar Keystrokes (Utility)
2. 3D Skin Layers (Aesthetics)
3. AutoGG Reimagined (Utility)
4. Entity Culling (Performace)
5. Freelook (Utility)
6. Fullbright (Utility)
7. Name Pain (Utility)
8. Not So Essential (Utility)
9. Phosphor (Performace)
10. Wavey Capes (Aesthetics)
11. Item Physic Lite (Aesthetics)
12. Better Bedwars: Reimagined (Aesthetics)
13. FoamFix (Performace)
14. FPS Reducer (Performace)

---
